title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Sanji, Capone Bege, Judge, Luffy, Nami, Jinbe as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Life's tears of hardship taste like...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Creation of the wedding cake - final touches

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can have this for Dessert then....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom pirates head chef "government knight STREUSEN"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Jinbe really reported to Mama, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, now... Sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sha sh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You need to calm down, pekoms!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BU- BUT PRALINE, IF BY SOME CHANCE THEY STOP THE REPORT... GAOH.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then even more so, you should leave it to jinbe!! You'll be done in again in your current condition!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right pekoms!! I forbid you to move as the ship's doctor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course!! Right now that traitor Bege is surely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Being beaten to a pulp by Mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I should do it myself... to be sure...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard noise coming from the inlet at night...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw sha- dows of people lu- gging stuff around...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thank you for saving me, but... I'm going!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait, wait! I won't allow that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you mean you won't allow it!! Gaoh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Hideout of Bege's crew is on the north-west side of the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will go ahead of you from inside the mirror!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we made it!! So this is BEEP's Hideout!!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: ...So, what kind of person is BEGE?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Time Until The Tea Party: 4 Hours and Is Minutes

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: OH...!! one of my germa heroes!!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Hey, where's everyone else!? Are you bege!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so happy to meet you again-rero!! NYURORO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes, don't worry, the others are already-rero.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys. Should go take a bath too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you so relaxed!! We don't have time, you know!? And you hate baths too!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 69 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
